rows.justification: Local single-user developer tool. No authentication, no PII/PAN, no secrets stored, no multi-tenant access, no network-exposed database, no production deployment. Design classifies as no-impact.

warnings.description: Header values from intercepted HTTP traffic are stored in SQLite without length validation. Parameterized queries prevent SQL injection, but excessively long header values could bloat the database.
warnings.recommendation: Consider truncating header values to a reasonable max length (e.g., 256 chars) before persistence.
